description: Authorize a separate Phase 52 bounded 128x128 seed42 longer run, recommended at 40 epochs, with the Phase 47 route otherwise fixed.
rationale: Tests the unresolved training-horizon question while changing only the bounded epoch horizon; it is the lowest-risk training expansion.

description: Run seed123 and seed202 at 128x128 after defining an adequate reviewed training horizon.
rationale: Replicating the 10-epoch pilot now would estimate variability around a training horizon that has not yet been reviewed as adequate.

description: Run a bounded higher-resolution pilot after the established 128x128 route is reviewed under a longer horizon.
rationale: Phase 46 established 256x256 data-path feasibility, not training stability; changing resolution would confound the horizon review.

description: Expand representative case reporting and manuscript interpretation without generating new training evidence.
rationale: Useful for reporting and can proceed separately, but it does not resolve whether the Phase 47 route improves, plateaus, or degrades.

description: Authorize neither training nor reporting expansion until reviewed evidence is complete and internally consistent.
rationale: Fail-closed fallback for missing or contradictory evidence; otherwise it leaves the main training-horizon question unanswered.
